en: Again, junkie scum. Also, again, not your fault. There's a major genetic component to addiction.
He says he's gonna file a police report. I could lose my license.
ko: 그는 경찰에 신고하겠다고 해. 나는 면허를 잃을 수도 있어.

en: We fight, and something in me just snaps. So I grab the first thing I can find, and I hit him with it.
ko: 우리는 싸우고, 내 안에서 뭔가가 터져버려.

en: You still have no murder weapon. I do now. Here's a pic I found on Yelp of the surgical suite six months ago,
and here's a shot that our crime scene photographer took of the same room two weeks after the murder.
Notice any differences? We're not answering that. That's all right. I can just tell you myself.
ko: 우리는 그 질문에 답하지 않을 거야.

en: The Yelp shot has six of these heavy-looking glass awards from the Brooklyn Periodontics Society in the background,
ko: Yelp 사진에는 배경에 브루클린 치주학회에서 받은 무거운 유리 상이 여섯 개 있어.

en: whereas this shot only has five. What happened to number six?
ko: 너는 모든 통제를 잃고 그를 죽였어. 피가 everywhere 있었을 거야, 하지만 너는 운이 좋았어.

en: You murdered Robert with it. I did. You lost all control, and you bludgeoned him to death.
ko: 너는 카펫이 깔린 사무실에서는 절대 빠져나갈 수 없었어.

en: There must have been blood everywhere, but you got lucky.
You were in the surgical suite. It can be sterilized.
You never would have gotten away with it in your carpeted office. That's not what happened.
ko: 그리고 너의 사무실 관리자는 모든 비명을 들었을 텐데,

en: Don't say anything more, Phillip. And your office manager would have heard all of the screaming,
ko: 그녀는 손자의 연극을 보고 있었어. 또 운이 좋네. 너는 틀렸어.

en: but she was at her grandson's play. Lucky again. You're wrong.
ko: 너는 로버트의 시신을 휠체어에 넣고 엘리베이터에 밀어넣었어.

en: You put Robert's body into a wheelchair and shoved it in the elevator.
ko: 피가 everywhere 없었던 건 기적이야. 그건 사실이 아니야.

en: It's a miracle there wasn't blood everywhere. That's not true. Now you're in the garage with a corpse.
ko: 이제 너는 차고에 시신과 함께 있어.

en: You panicked and left your phone in your office, and you don't have your car keys, but Robert's are in his pocket,
ko: 당신은 당황해서 사무실에 전화기를 두고 나왔고, 차 키도 없지만 로버트의 차 키는 그의 주머니에 있으니 그를 그의 차에 태웠어.

en: so you put him in his car, and you take off.
ko: 당신은 당황해서 사무실에 전화기를 두고 나왔고, 차 키도 없지만 로버트의 차 키는 그의 주머니에 있으니 그를 그의 차에 태웠어.
